description_long: This is a large, mounted anti-materiel rifle with a robust, industrial design, likely intended for heavy-duty use in urban defense or tactical scenarios. The rifle is supported by a sturdy tripod base, providing stability for high-caliber firing and minimizing recoil. It features a long, prominent barrel with a muzzle device at the end, and a thick, rectangular shield that offers protection to the operator. The rear section includes a padded buttstock and a visible firing mechanism, while the central body houses the action and mounting hardware. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer or composite elements for ergonomic parts, and the finish is matte with dark, military-style coloration.
description: A heavy, tripod-mounted anti-materiel rifle with a long barrel, protective shield, and robust metal construction, designed for urban tactical use. The rifle features a matte dark finish and prominent mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular shield, central barrel opening, and tripod legs extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long barrel, muzzle device, and the full length of the protective shield and tripod.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the buttstock, firing mechanism, and the back of the shield, with tripod legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the barrel, shield, and mounting hardware, mirroring the other side.
